dj_text: That was Jokeren - Kun os to feat. Pauline (Official Music Video). Taking it easy with Gulddreng - Model. Got a nice little set going. 5 more after this one.
commercial_text: Introducing the iBrick Pro Max Ultra — it's just a brick. But it's OUR brick.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
